parameters.name: createpointprim
parameters.label: Create Point Primitives
parameters.description: Enable creating point primitives

parameters.name: pointidreuse
parameters.label: Point Id Reuse
parameters.description: Point Id recycling mode.

parameters.name: maxparticles
parameters.label: Maximum Particles
parameters.description: Sets the maximum number of particles.

parameters.name: emissionmode
parameters.label: Emission from
parameters.description: Determines how particles are emitted

parameters.name: birthrate
parameters.label: Birth Rate
parameters.description: Number of particles born each unit of time

parameters.name: birthattr
parameters.label: Input Birth Attribute
parameters.description: Input attribute to specify birth rate.

parameters.name: rndinputpts
parameters.label: Randomize Input Points
parameters.description: Enable source points shuffling.

parameters.name: life
parameters.label: Life Expect
parameters.description: Life Expectancy average time.

parameters.name: lifevariance
parameters.label: Life Variance (Fraction)
parameters.description: Life Expectancy variation as fractoin of life expectancy.

parameters.name: randomseed
parameters.label: Random Seed
parameters.description: Life variance and source position random seed.

parameters.name: initmass
parameters.label: Initial Mass
parameters.description: Determines the particle's mass.

parameters.name: initdrag
parameters.label: Initial Drag
parameters.description: Determines the drag factor applied to the particle causing it to decelerate.

parameters.name: damping
parameters.label: Velocity Damping
parameters.description: Sets a multiplicative coefficient applied each frame to the particle's velocity to reduce its speed over time. It scales velocity down each frame exponentially.

parameters.name: initializepulse
parameters.label: Initialize
parameters.description: Initializes the from its input and parameters, it indicates it’s ready by turning on the ready channel in an attached Info , awaiting a Start pulse.

parameters.name: startpulse
parameters.label: Start
parameters.description: Start the particle simulation.

parameters.name: play
parameters.label: Play
parameters.description: Pause or play the feedback loop.

parameters.name: speed
parameters.label: Speed
parameters.description: Simulation speed.

parameters.name: preroll
parameters.label: Pre-Roll
parameters.description: Run the loop for this time before it is ready during initialization..

parameters.name: donepulse
parameters.label: Go to Done
parameters.description: Will immediately go to the done state.

parameters.name: attrs
parameters.label: In Attributes
parameters.description: Input attributes to copy to new particles.

parameters.name: renameto
parameters.label: Rename to
parameters.description: Change the input attributes to a new name.

parameters.name: usedeathattr
parameters.label: Use Death Attribute
parameters.description: Enable using the Death Attribute to force-kill particles.

parameters.name: attr
parameters.label: New Attribute
parameters.description: Name of sequential block to create new attributes.

parameters.name: attr0name
parameters.label: New Attribute Name
parameters.description: Choose to create a predefined attribute or a custom attribute.

parameters.name: attr0type
parameters.label: Attribute Type
parameters.description: Determines the type.

parameters.name: map
parameters.label: Mapping
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for attribute-to-parameter mapping.

parameters.name: map0op
parameters.label: OP
parameters.description: Source OP for parameter mapping. The default of _in0 means the input .

parameters.name: map0element
parameters.label: Element
parameters.description: The attribute (or component of an attribute) that will be mapped to a parameter per-point.

parameters.name: map0parm
parameters.label: Parameter
parameters.description: Parameter on the current that will be mapped from the Element (the attribute).

parameters.name: map0combineop
parameters.label: Combine Operation
parameters.description: Combine operation for attribute value with parameter value.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

parameters.name: initvelocityz
parameters.label: Initvelocityz
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: attr0value3
parameters.label: Attr0Value3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: steppulse
parameters.label: Steppulse
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: attr0customname
parameters.label: Attr0Customname
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: attr0numcomps
parameters.label: Attr0Numcomps
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

examples.label: Configure Birth Rate and Maximum Particles
examples.description: Common settings from 30 real Derivative examples
